summary: Execute immediate RRA follow-up call now (Kigali business hours) to secure a 30-minute discovery/demo this week.
reasoning: Most impactful overdue revenue task; sales agent is idle; it is within Kigali business hours; prior directives remain unexecuted—act now to progress the deal.

task.title: RRA follow-up: call now and secure 30-minute discovery/demo (Kigali/CAT)
task.description: 1) Review CRM/account notes and confirm whether last night's follow-up email was sent; if not, send it now to the primary contact (cc known stakeholders) proposing three 30-minute slots within the next 3 business days (Kigali/CAT) with a clear agenda, one-pager, and relevant case study. 2) Call the primary contact immediately (within Kigali business hours 08:30–17:30 CAT); if unreachable, leave voicemail (if available) and within 10 minutes attempt an alternate via the RRA switchboard. 3) On live contact, confirm needs, stakeholders, decision process, timeline, and any procurement/compliance requirements; handle objections; aim to book the 30-minute discovery/demo and send a calendar invite. 4) Log all call attempts, emails, and outcomes in the CRM; either book the meeting or schedule the next follow-up within 48 hours with blockers noted. 5) If numbers are invalid or email bounces, flag specific gaps for enrichment and hand off to the research agent. 6) Post a brief status update immediately after the call attempts; deadline: within 60 minutes.
